economic_notes: Government business partnerships include: Lake Helen Gas & Variety LP (gas bar and variety store), Red Rock General Construction Logistics LP (storage and construction services), Nipigon & Red Rock Plumbing & Heating LP (plumbing and heating services). GBE 2190774 Ontario Limited operates commercial office building rentals. OPG Settlement account held internally restricted for Band member payments.
notes: Audit is qualified on two grounds: (1) inability to observe physical inventory of $346,984 for three government business partnerships accounted for on modified equity basis; (2) First Nation did not prepare approved budgets as required by PSAS. Province is Ontario. Six entities fully consolidated on line-by-line basis; four entities (one GBE and three partnerships) on modified equity basis. Repayable to funder of $1,776,985 on balance sheet. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $10,062,020 + CMHC $460,816 + Agriculture Canada $60,266 + Ministry of Community and Social Services $476,252 + Ministry of Education $77,604 + Ministry of Indigenous Relations & Reconciliation $85,000 + Ministry of Health and Long-Term Care $110,100 + Ministry of Transportation $66,532 + Fisheries and Oceans Canada $0 + Ministry of Natural Resources $0 = $11,398,590; plus Aboriginal Employment and Training Services $245,918 = $11,644,508 approximately. OSR includes portfolio income, admin fees, Dilico, OFNLP, interest, other revenue, Enbridge, rental income, TransCanada, Union of Ontario Indians, and adjustments for deferred revenue and repayable to funder.
